description: Technovus is the technical fest competition of Jorhat Engineering college. It is Organised for the first time in the college. Jec Roboworld organised 10 competitions in this technical fest
Jec Roboworld, along with Phoenix coordinators, organised technosphere'19. This year, students from all over NE participated in 6 different events
JEC Roboworld participated in Smart India Hackathon 2019, showcasing innovative solutions and technical expertise in national level competition.
Comprehensive robotics education program covering embedded systems and AI programming during the pandemic period.
